description: A vertical graphic on an orange textured background. Bold text at the top reads ARRESTED, BY ICE ST. PAUL ON FEB. 13, 2025. The center holds a framed photograph of a man in a white shirt and dark jacket standing outdoors in a snowy parking area beside an officer and an SUV. A black banner near the bottom reads HOMICIDE, with a small White House logo and WH.GOV below.
notable_text: ARRESTED; BY ICE ST. PAUL ON FEB. 13, 2025; HOMICIDE; WH.GOV
